# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- Conveyor 1: length 112cm, travel time 7.82s, sensor-to-camera distance 140mm, belt speed 143.2 mm/s
- Maintain a dedicated implementation document in the repo for major feature changes (e.g., logging pipeline updates) for future reference.

## Image Processing Instructions
- For manual image sanity checks, loading an image should trigger inspection behavior similar to stream processing.
- Defect-only logs should be saved under the loaded image's directory.
